```css title=main.css
.\.\/_f\.module_\.\/_f-1--\/__4abe9cc818c5f8e5\<4ab {
    color: black;
}
.\.\/_f\.module_\.\/_f--\/__4abe9cc818c5f8e5\<4ab {
}

.\.\/_d\.module_\.\/_d-1--\/__88281ab83c534746\<882 {
    color: green;
}

.\.\/_d\.module_\.\/_d--\/__88281ab83c534746\<882 {
}

.\.\/_b\.module_\.\/_b-1--\/__770815d283e5419e\<770 {
    color: red;
}
.\.\/_b\.module_\.\/_b--\/__770815d283e5419e\<770 {
}
.\.\/_style\.module_\.\/_chain2--\/__2f98424dcb9d6a7c\<2f9 {
  background: blue;
}

.\.\/_style\.module_\.\/_chain1--\/__2f98424dcb9d6a7c\<2f9 {
  background: green;
}

.\.\/_style\.module_\.\/_root-class--\/__2f98424dcb9d6a7c\<2f9 {
  background: red;
}


```

```js title=main.js
"use strict";
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) {
__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);
/* import */ var _style_module_css__rspack_import_0 = __webpack_require__("./style.module.css");



},
"./b.module.css"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
var exports = {
  "b-1": "./_b.module_./_b-1--/__770815d283e5419e<770",
  "b": "./_b.module_./_b--/__770815d283e5419e<770" + " " + "./_b.module_./_b-1--/__770815d283e5419e<770",
};

__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = exports);


},
"./d.module.css"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
var exports = {
  "d-1": "./_d.module_./_d-1--/__88281ab83c534746<882",
  "d": "./_d.module_./_d--/__88281ab83c534746<882" + " " + "./_d.module_./_d-1--/__88281ab83c534746<882",
};

__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = exports);


},
"./f.module.css"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
var exports = {
  "f-1": "./_f.module_./_f-1--/__4abe9cc818c5f8e5<4ab",
  "f": "./_f.module_./_f--/__4abe9cc818c5f8e5<4ab" + " " + "./_f.module_./_f-1--/__4abe9cc818c5f8e5<4ab",
};

__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = exports);


},
"./style.module.css"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
var exports = {
  "chain2": "./_style.module_./_chain2--/__2f98424dcb9d6a7c<2f9" + " " + "e" + " " + __webpack_require__("./f.module.css")["f"],
  "chain1": "./_style.module_./_chain1--/__2f98424dcb9d6a7c<2f9" + " " + "./_style.module_./_chain2--/__2f98424dcb9d6a7c<2f9" + " " + "e" + " " + __webpack_require__("./f.module.css")["f"] + " " + "c" + " " + __webpack_require__("./d.module.css")["d"],
  "root-class": "./_style.module_./_root-class--/__2f98424dcb9d6a7c<2f9" + " " + "./_style.module_./_chain1--/__2f98424dcb9d6a7c<2f9" + " " + "./_style.module_./_chain2--/__2f98424dcb9d6a7c<2f9" + " " + "e" + " " + __webpack_require__("./f.module.css")["f"] + " " + "c" + " " + __webpack_require__("./d.module.css")["d"] + " " + "a" + " " + __webpack_require__("./b.module.css")["b"],
};

__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = exports);


},

},function(__webpack_require__) {
var __webpack_exec__ = function(moduleId) { return __webpack_require__(__webpack_require__.s = moduleId) }
var __webpack_exports__ = (__webpack_exec__("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
